subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! From the time when, with the utmost devotion and supplication and sincerity, thou didst yearn to serve in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از وقتیکه در سبیل الهی بکمال توجه و تضرع و خلوص آرزوی خدمت
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
